---
title: "Hypergraph-based Repository for Software Visualization Systems"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2009-04-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Student Research Conference 2009 - 5th IIT.SRC"
  publisher: "STU v Bratislave FIIT"
  isbn: "978-80-227-3052-5"
  page: "251-258"
---
